name: Iter10 — Developer Profile empty state for unknown user
description: Verify that navigating directly to /developer/:username for a username with no reviews shows the empty state message.

planSteps.description: The page loads without a white screen or crash — the AI PR Reviewer header is visible
An avatar image is visible even though the user has no reviews (GitHub always returns an avatar URL)
Stat cards section is visible on the page
The message 'No reviews found for @nonexistent-user-xyz-99999' is visible
